proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_enzalutamide=1 have different mean pfs_months than patients with treatment_enzalutamide=0.
Patients receiving treatment_abiraterone=1 have different mean pfs_months than patients with treatment_abiraterone=0.
Patients receiving treatment_docetaxel=1 have different mean pfs_months than patients with treatment_docetaxel=0.
Patients receiving treatment_olaparib=1 have different mean pfs_months than patients with treatment_olaparib=0.
Patients receiving treatment_lu177_psma=1 have different mean pfs_months than patients with treatment_lu177_psma=0.
Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab=1 have different mean pfs_months than patients with treatment_pembrolizumab=0.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months: 3.728 on treatment_enzalutamide vs 3.755 off; diff=-0.026 months (Welch t-test p=0.153).
Mean pfs_months: 3.740 on treatment_abiraterone vs 3.746 off; diff=-0.006 months (Welch t-test p=0.776).
Mean pfs_months: 3.732 on treatment_docetaxel vs 3.749 off; diff=-0.017 months (Welch t-test p=0.381).
Mean pfs_months: 3.829 on treatment_olaparib vs 3.735 off; diff=+0.094 months (Welch t-test p=0.00329).
Mean pfs_months: 3.741 on treatment_lu177_psma vs 3.745 off; diff=-0.004 months (Welch t-test p=0.872).
Mean pfs_months: 3.805 on treatment_pembrolizumab vs 3.741 off; diff=+0.064 months (Welch t-test p=0.137).

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_olaparib improves pfs_months more in BRCA2-mutant patients (brca2_mutation=1) than in BRCA2 wild-type — a positive interaction in pfs_months ~ treatment_olaparib*brca2_mutation.
Within brca2_mutation=1, treatment_olaparib=1 yields higher mean pfs_months than treatment_olaparib=0.
Within brca2_mutation=0, treatment_olaparib=1 has no significant effect on pfs_months.

analyses.code: ttest pfs_months by treatment_olaparib within brca2_mutation=1
analyses.result_summary: In brca2_mutation=1 (n_tx=529, n_ctrl=4467): olaparib effect=+1.545 months, p=3.95e-27.

analyses.code: ttest pfs_months by treatment_olaparib within brca2_mutation=0
analyses.result_summary: In brca2_mutation=0 (n_tx=4569, n_ctrl=40435): olaparib effect=-0.073 months, p=0.0191.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_pembrolizumab improves pfs_months more in msi_high=1 than in msi_high=0 (positive interaction).
Within msi_high=1, treatment_pembrolizumab=1 yields higher pfs_months than treatment_pembrolizumab=0.
Within msi_high=0, treatment_pembrolizumab=1 has no significant effect on pfs_months.

analyses.code: ttest pfs_months by treatment_pembrolizumab within msi_high=1
analyses.result_summary: In msi_high=1 (n_tx=79, n_ctrl=1449): pembrolizumab effect=-0.265 months, p=0.239.

analyses.code: ttest pfs_months by treatment_pembrolizumab within msi_high=0
analyses.result_summary: In msi_high=0 (n_tx=2305, n_ctrl=46167): pembrolizumab effect=+0.075 months, p=0.0864.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_lu177_psma improves pfs_months more in psma_high=1 than in psma_high=0 (positive interaction).
Within psma_high=1, treatment_lu177_psma=1 yields higher pfs_months than treatment_lu177_psma=0.
Within psma_high=0, treatment_lu177_psma=1 has no significant effect on pfs_months.

analyses.code: ttest pfs_months by treatment_lu177_psma within psma_high=1
analyses.result_summary: In psma_high=1 (n_tx=4486, n_ctrl=25476): lu177_psma effect=-0.011 months, p=0.736.

analyses.code: ttest pfs_months by treatment_lu177_psma within psma_high=0
analyses.result_summary: In psma_high=0 (n_tx=3018, n_ctrl=17020): lu177_psma effect=+0.006 months, p=0.874.

proposed_hypotheses.text: AR-V7 positivity attenuates the pfs_months benefit of treatment_enzalutamide (negative interaction term).
AR-V7 positivity attenuates the pfs_months benefit of treatment_abiraterone (negative interaction term).
Within ar_v7_positive=0, treatment_enzalutamide=1 has higher mean pfs_months than treatment_enzalutamide=0.
Within ar_v7_positive=1, treatment_enzalutamide=1 has reduced or no benefit on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: In ar_v7_positive=0: enzalutamide effect=-0.027 months, p=0.193.

analyses.code: ttest pfs_months by treatment_enzalutamide within ar_v7_positive=1
analyses.result_summary: In ar_v7_positive=1: enzalutamide effect=-0.024 months, p=0.557.

After adjusting for age_years, ecog_ps, mcrpc, visceral_mets, ldh_u_l, hemoglobin_g_dl, albumin_g_dl, the unconditional adjusted effect of treatment_olaparib on pfs_months is small (because benefit is concentrated in BRCA2-mutant subgroup).
After the same adjustment, treatment_lu177_psma has a positive adjusted effect on pfs_months (since most patients are PSMA-high).
After the same adjustment, treatment_pembrolizumab has at most a small unconditional effect on pfs_months (since msi_high prevalence is low).

analyses.code: ols pfs_months ~ treatment_olaparib + age_years + ecog_ps + mcrpc + visceral_mets + ldh_u_l + hemoglobin_g_dl + albumin_g_dl
ols pfs_months ~ treatment_lu177_psma + age_years + ecog_ps + mcrpc + visceral_mets + ldh_u_l + hemoglobin_g_dl + albumin_g_dl
ols pfs_months ~ treatment_pembrolizumab + age_years + ecog_ps + mcrpc + visceral_mets + ldh_u_l + hemoglobin_g_dl + albumin_g_dl

proposed_hypotheses.text: The pfs_months effect of treatment_docetaxel differs by prior_chemotherapy status (interaction term in pfs_months ~ treatment_docetaxel*prior_chemotherapy).
Within prior_chemotherapy=0, treatment_docetaxel=1 yields higher mean pfs_months than treatment_docetaxel=0.
Within prior_chemotherapy=1, the docetaxel benefit is reduced or absent.

analyses.code: ttest pfs_months by treatment_docetaxel within prior_chemotherapy=0
analyses.result_summary: In prior_chemotherapy=0: docetaxel effect=-0.030 months, p=0.252.

analyses.code: ttest pfs_months by treatment_docetaxel within prior_chemotherapy=1
analyses.result_summary: In prior_chemotherapy=1: docetaxel effect=-0.001 months, p=0.969.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The benefit of treatment_docetaxel on pfs_months is smaller in patients with higher ecog_ps (negative interaction in pfs_months ~ treatment_docetaxel*ecog_ps).
The benefit of treatment_enzalutamide on pfs_months is smaller in patients with higher ecog_ps (negative interaction).
The pfs_months effect of treatment_docetaxel is more positive within ecog_ps==0 than within ecog_ps==2 (i.e. effect difference is positive).

analyses.code: compare docetaxel effect ecog==0 vs ecog==2

proposed_hypotheses.text: visceral_mets=1 patients show diminished benefit from treatment_enzalutamide on pfs_months (negative interaction with visceral_mets).
liver_mets=1 patients show diminished benefit from treatment_abiraterone on pfs_months (negative interaction).
bone_mets=1 patients derive larger benefit from treatment_lu177_psma than bone_mets=0 (positive interaction).
Within brca2_mutation=1, treatment_olaparib retains a positive effect on pfs_months after adjusting for age_years, ecog_ps, mcrpc, visceral_mets, ldh_u_l, hemoglobin_g_dl, albumin_g_dl.
Within msi_high=1, treatment_pembrolizumab retains a positive effect on pfs_months after the same adjustment.
Within psma_high=1, treatment_lu177_psma retains a positive effect on pfs_months after the same adjustment.

analyses.code: within brca2_mutation=1: ols pfs_months ~ treatment_olaparib + covars
analyses.result_summary: In brca2_mutation=1 (n=4996): adjusted treatment_olaparib coef=+1.442 months, p=1.05e-229.

analyses.code: within msi_high=1: ols pfs_months ~ treatment_pembrolizumab + covars
analyses.result_summary: In msi_high=1 (n=1528): adjusted treatment_pembrolizumab coef=+0.009 months, p=0.893.

analyses.code: within psma_high=1: ols pfs_months ~ treatment_lu177_psma + covars
analyses.result_summary: In psma_high=1 (n=29962): adjusted treatment_lu177_psma coef=-0.013 months, p=0.204.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In brca2_mutation=0, the adjusted effect of treatment_olaparib on pfs_months is non-positive (zero or negative).
In msi_high=0, the adjusted effect of treatment_pembrolizumab on pfs_months is non-positive.
In psma_high=0, the adjusted effect of treatment_lu177_psma on pfs_months is non-positive.

analyses.result_summary: In brca2_mutation=0 (n=45004): adjusted treatment_olaparib coef=-0.009 months, p=0.309.

analyses.result_summary: In msi_high=0 (n=48472): adjusted treatment_pembrolizumab coef=+0.008 months, p=0.526.

In a multivariable OLS of pfs_months on age_years, ecog_ps, psa_ng_ml, gleason_score, ldh_u_l, hemoglobin_g_dl, albumin_g_dl, alkaline_phosphatase_u_l, mcrpc, visceral_mets, ecog_ps remains a significant negative predictor.
In the same model, hemoglobin_g_dl is a significant positive predictor.
In the same model, albumin_g_dl is a significant positive predictor.
In the same model, ldh_u_l is a significant negative predictor.
In the same model, alkaline_phosphatase_u_l is a significant negative predictor.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for age_years, ecog_ps, ldh_u_l, hemoglobin_g_dl, albumin_g_dl, mcrpc, visceral_mets and prior_lines_of_therapy, race_ethnicity is no longer significantly associated with pfs_months.
After the same adjustment, insurance_type is no longer significantly associated with pfs_months.
After the same adjustment, rural_residence is no longer significantly associated with pfs_months.

analyses.code: ols pfs_months ~ C(race_ethnicity) + age_years + ecog_ps + ldh_u_l + hemoglobin_g_dl + albumin_g_dl + mcrpc + visceral_mets + prior_lines_of_therapy
analyses.result_summary: Race coefs: {'C(race_ethnicity)[T.black]': -0.013028256507810759, 'C(race_ethnicity)[T.hispanic]': -0.010736632280450131, 'C(race_ethnicity)[T.other]': 0.010676656973644269, 'C(race_ethnicity)[T.white]': -0.00791603307700941}; min p across categories = 0.333.

analyses.code: ols pfs_months ~ C(insurance_type) + age_years + ecog_ps + ldh_u_l + hemoglobin_g_dl + albumin_g_dl + mcrpc + visceral_mets + prior_lines_of_therapy
ols pfs_months ~ rural_residence + age_years + ecog_ps + ldh_u_l + hemoglobin_g_dl + albumin_g_dl + mcrpc + visceral_mets + prior_lines_of_therapy

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving both treatment_enzalutamide=1 AND treatment_abiraterone=1 do not show additive pfs_months benefit beyond either alone (interaction term enzalutamide:abiraterone in OLS is non-positive or zero).
Patients receiving both treatment_docetaxel=1 AND treatment_enzalutamide=1 show a positive interaction (docetaxel:enzalutamide coef > 0), reflecting synergy or selection.
Within mcrpc=1 patients, the olaparib x brca2_mutation interaction on pfs_months is positive and significant.
Within mcrpc=0 patients, the olaparib x brca2_mutation interaction on pfs_months is also positive (PARP-i activity should be biomarker-driven regardless of mCRPC).

In a multivariable OLS that includes all six treatments (main effects), the three biomarker-treatment interactions (olaparib:brca2_mutation, pembrolizumab:msi_high, lu177_psma:psma_high), and key prognostics (age, ecog_ps, ldh_u_l, hemoglobin_g_dl, albumin_g_dl, alk_phos, mcrpc, visceral_mets), the olaparib:brca2_mutation interaction is positive and significant.
In the same model, the pembrolizumab:msi_high interaction is positive and significant.
In the same model, the lu177_psma:psma_high interaction is positive and significant.
In the same model, the main-effect coefficients for treatment_olaparib (when biomarker=0) and treatment_pembrolizumab (when biomarker=0) are not positive (any benefit is biomarker-restricted).

analyses.code: full multivariable ols: pfs_months ~ treatment_enzalutamide + treatment_abiraterone + treatment_docetaxel + treatment_olaparib*brca2_mutation + treatment_pembrolizumab*msi_high + treatment_lu177_psma*psma_high + age_years + ecog_ps + ldh_u_l + hemoglobin_g_dl + albumin_g_dl + alkaline_phosphatase_u_l + mcrpc + visceral_mets

full multivariable ols: pfs_months ~ treatment_enzalutamide + treatment_abiraterone + treatment_docetaxel + treatment_olaparib*brca2_mutation + treatment_pembrolizumab*msi_high + treatment_lu177_psma*psma_high + age_years + ecog_ps + ldh_u_l + hemoglobin_g_dl + albumin_g_dl + alkaline_phosphatase_u_l + mcrpc + visceral_mets

full multivariable ols: pfs_months ~ treatment_enzalutamide + treatment_abiraterone + treatment_docetaxel + treatment_olaparib*brca2_mutation + treatment_pembrolizumab*msi_high + treatment_lu177_psma*psma_high + age_years + ecog_ps + ldh_u_l + hemoglobin_g_dl + albumin_g_dl + alkaline_phosphatase_u_l + mcrpc + visceral_mets

analyses.result_summary: olaparib (in brca2=0): -0.009 (p=0.341); pembrolizumab (in msi=0): +0.009 (p=0.464); lu177_psma (in psma=0): -0.006 (p=0.585).
